expectations.text: questions_asked: output contains at least one question ending with '?'
expectations.evidence: Two questions asked: 'What's the main goal across these changes?' and 'Is this related to a specific GitHub issue?'

expectations.text: questions_are_relevant: question mentions display/pipeline/thermal or asks about purpose/scope
expectations.evidence: Question 1 directly asks about purpose of changes; question 2 asks about GitHub issue linkage — both are high-signal questions per the skill's intent

expectations.text: type_is_refactor: final commit message starts with 'refactor('
no_fabricated_issue_link: commit message does not contain 'closes #' or 'refs #' without user confirmation
expectations.evidence: No closes/refs footer in the message — user confirmed no specific issue
